# Project Guidelines

## Code Style
- Python only
- Keep code as simple and direct as possible
- No unnecessary abstractions, helpers, or generalized code
- Prefer straightforward, linear logic over clever patterns

## Conventions
- Do not add type annotations unless explicitly asked
- Do not add docstrings unless explicitly asked
- Do not add tests or test files unless explicitly asked
- Do not add error handling beyond what is strictly necessary
- Avoid creating utility functions for one-time operations

## Communication
- Before running any terminal command or action that requires user approval, explain what the command does and why
